title: Brett R. Bessen
text:
I am an Assistant Professor in Political Science and International Relations at Tecnológico de Monterrey in Mexico. I received my Ph.D. from the University of Colorado Boulder.
My research focuses on why people support or resist elected leaders who undermine democracy. I also study public attitudes about migration and direct democracy in varying political contexts. My work combines survey experiments, text analysis, and multilevel statistical modeling.
My research has been published in PNAS, Comparative Political Studies, Political Behavior, Electoral Studies, and Research & Politics, among other journals.
brettbessen@tec.mx | Google Scholar | Twitter/X | LinkedIn
